title: Data harmonisation protocol
author: Jonsson, Johanna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The aim of this document is to provide a manual for the harmonisation of outcome-, exposure- and mediator-data across the cohorts of the Equal-Life project, aligning with the WP7 task 7.1 (see more details in the grant agreement). The harmonisation strategy is based on an adaptation of the harmonisation manual developed in the LifeCycle project (1) as well as the Molgenis database (2) to the extent possible. As a result of this harmonisation process, variables generated within each cohort participating in Equal-Life will be comparable.
steps_raw: The aim of this document is to provide a manual for the harmonisation of outcome-, exposure- and mediator-data across the cohorts of the Equal-Life project, aligning with the WP7 task 7.1 (see more details in the grant agreement). The harmonisation strategy is based on an adaptation of the harmonisation manual developed in the LifeCycle project (1) as well as the Molgenis database (2) to the extent possible. As a result of this harmonisation process, variables generated within each cohort participating in Equal-Life will be comparable.
